channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Meta tests letting Facebook Marketplace users view eBay listings in a bid to appease the EU
item.description: Meta is testing a feature that will let Facebook users browse eBay listings on Facebook Marketplace before being redirected to complete the purchase on eBay. The test, which is being launched to a small group in Germany, France, and the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Why I’m making 2025 my year of dead-tree books
item.description: Over the past 17 years or so, I have happily paid for hundreds of e-books—everything from reference works to history to novels to comics. Having immediate access to all of them on a device that fits in my pocket ranks among my favorite miracles of the digital age.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: From AI assistants to holographic displays, automakers showcase in-cabin experiences at CES
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Interior lighting aimed at reducing motion sickness. Shiny holographic dashboards displayed on windshields. And AI-powered voice assistants paired with infotainment systems to keep you company on long drives.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Meta rolls back hate speech rules as Zuckerberg cites 'recent elections' as a catalyst
item.description: It wasn't just fact-checking that Meta scrapped from its platforms as it prepares for the second Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Examining disk space on Linux
item.description: There are many ways to evaluate disk space usage on Linux, and this post examines a number of commands that allow you to view used and available disk space.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Still keeping data in unlicensed Microsoft OneDrive? Act now or lose it forever
item.description: Microsoft’s plans to remove data from unlicensed OneDrive accounts will come into force later this month.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: This Nintendo Switch 2 mockup from CES 2025 is allegedly based on the console itself, making us think an official announcement has to be imminent
item.description: Accessory maker Genki shows off Nintendo Switch 2 mockup at CES 2025 - and apparently it's very close to the real thing.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Denon's 22-speaker EV audio system promises hearing tests to make sure each speaker is tailored to you
item.description: Denon's 22-speaker EV audio system promises to sound so big, you'll want to stay in your car forever.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Japan links Chinese hacker MirrorFace to dozens of cyberattacks targeting security and tech data
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japan on Wednesday linked more than 200 cyberattacks over the past five years targeting the country's national security and high technology data to a Chinese hacking group, MirrorFace, detailing their tactics and calling on government agencies and businesses to reinforce preventive meas
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Instagram is in hot water for blocking LGBTQ+ content
item.description: Meta, the parent company of Instagram and Facebook, is facing backlash for its handling of LGBTQIA+ content on its platforms.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Meta looking for 'sweetheart deal' with Trump: FTC chair
item.description: Outgoing Federal Trade Commission (FTC) Chair Lina Khan suggested Tuesday that Meta and other companies facing antitrust lawsuits from the agency might be looking for “sweetheart deals” from the incoming Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Emirati billionaire investing $20B in US to build data centers
item.description: President-elect Trump announced Tuesday that Emirati billionaire Hussain Sajwani plans to invest $20 billion in the United States “over a very short period of time” to build data centers across the country.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Meta's new board includes UFC boss Dana White, a familiar figure in Trump's orbit
item.description: Meta has appointed three new members to its board of directors, including Dana White, the president and CEO of Ultimate Fighting Championship and a familiar figure in the orbit of incoming President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Nvidia’s Project DIGITS puts AI supercomputing chips on the desktop
item.description: Nvidia has built its generative AI (genAI) business on delivering massive computing capacity to data centers where it can be used to train and refine large language models (LLMs).
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: With o3 having reached AGI, OpenAI turns its sights toward superintelligence
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has reinvigorated discussion of artificial general intelligence (AGI), boldly claiming that his company’s newest model has reached that milestone.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Uber and Lyft to offer driverless rideshare cars
item.description: Customers in Atlanta and Austin, Texas, will be able to hail one of these driverless rideshare cars via the Uber app.
item.dc:creator: Nancy Loo, NewsNation

item.title: Fubo combining with Disney's Hulu + Live TV; lawsuit against Venu Sports settled
item.description: Disney's Hulu + Live TV and sports streaming service Fubo are combining in a deal that will also see the settlement of a lawsuit against the creation of Venu Sports.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: China protests US sanctions for its alleged role in hacking, complains of foreign hacker attacks
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China has slammed a decision by the U.S. Treasury to sanction a Beijing-based cybersecurity company for its alleged role in multiple hacking incidents targeting critical U.S. infrastructure, while the Chinese cyber security agency complained Monday of attacks on Chinese networks.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Create custom visuals on your iPhone with Image Playground in iOS 18.2
item.description: Apple's Image Playground transforms text prompts into images or animations in seconds, brining a world of creativity to the palm of your hand.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What to know about Apple's $95 million settlement of the snooping Siri case
item.description: Apple has agreed to pay $95 million to settle a lawsuit that accused the company of turning its virtual assistant Siri into a snoop that eavesdropped on the users of iPhones and other trendy devices in a betrayal to its long-standing commitment to personal privacy.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Appeals court blocks return of US net neutrality rules for ISPs
item.description: The reintroduction of neutrality rules for network providers is looking increasingly unlikely, at least for the next five years, after a US appeals court blocked efforts by the US Federal Communications Commission (FCC) to reinstate them.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: For Apple IT admins, the new year means it’s a good time to upskill
item.description: Continuing education has always been important for IT professionals, but the need to keep your skill set up to date is now more important than ever.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Write Python like it’s 2025
item.description: It’s a new year, and we feel fine! 2024 was a breakout year for our favorite programming language, and we have a feeling 2025 will be even bigger.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Go teams struggle with coding standards – survey
item.description: Although developer sentiment toward the Go language remains very positive, teams face a challenge when it comes to maintaining consistent coding standards across Go code bases, according to Go developer survey results for the second half of 2024.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AI, power availability and Intel’s future
item.description: As 2025 kicks off, it’s time to dust off the crystal ball. Here are my data center predictions for the coming year. 1) Trump backs off on tech tariffs For all the handwringing, Trump has a history of not following through on his threats.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: What is Turo? Car rental app used in New Orleans and Las Vegas
item.description: Turo, a San Francisco-based company founded in 2010, operates differently from traditional car rental services.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation
